metadata.title: BApps | Custom Application Development
metadata.description: We build custom web apps, mobile apps, and landing pages. Turning ideas into exceptional digital experiences.

hero.title: We create digital experiences
hero.subtitle: Custom web apps, mobile apps, and landing pages built for you.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to bring your idea to the digital world.

webApps.title: Your custom system
webApps.description: We turn your idea into a digital tool that works for you, without relying on generic platforms.

mobileApps.title: App for your phone
mobileApps.description: Keep your customers close. Works on iPhone and Android from a single codebase.

landingPages.title: Your digital storefront
landingPages.description: A page built to turn anyone who finds you on Google into a customer.

ecommerce.title: Online store
ecommerce.description: Sell around the clock without the hassle. Payments, inventory, and shipping in one place.

uiux.title: Easy and beautiful
uiux.description: We design the experience so your users find what they need without getting frustrated.

consulting.title: We help you decide
consulting.description: No jargon. We analyze your situation and tell you what to build, how, and in what order.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: Some of the experiences we've built.

projectsPage.title: Our projects
projectsPage.subtitle: Every project is a story of collaboration, innovation, and results.

contact.title: Get a quote
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your idea and we'll get back to you within 24h.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll reach out soon.
contact.error: We could not send your message. Please try again in a few minutes.
